title: Uncompromising Mexican Chicken Casserole
description: A tangy, dense chicken casserole perfect for sick days, made with unflavored gelatin for structure and baked in a wood-fired style oven. It is keto-friendly and packs a flavorful punch.
instructions: Preheat a wood-fired oven or conventional oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat and sauté onion and garlic until fragrant, about 3 minutes.
Add diced chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Stir in diced green chilies, tomato sauce, oregano, lime juice, salt, and pepper, then simmer for 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, dissolve gelatin powder in 1/4 cup warm water and let sit for 2 minutes to bloom.
Toss the gelatin mixture into the skillet and stir until the sauce thickens slightly, about 2 minutes.
Transfer the chicken mixture to a casserole dish, spreading it evenly.
Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese over the top of the casserole.
Bake uncovered for 20 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Let the casserole rest for 5 minutes before serving to set.
